articles.title: Guide Lessons for November - Lesson I: Theology and Testimony
articles.notes: The provided PDF pages (523-527) contain different content including a poem 'Vacation's Disease' by Linnie Fisher Robinson and 'Guide Lessons For October - Lesson I: Theology and Testimony' about the Book of Mormon. The November guide lessons are not present in these pages.

articles.title: Guide Lessons for November - Lesson II Work and Business
articles.notes: The provided PDF pages (523-527) contain different content: page 446 shows Relief Society Magazine with dates and a poem 'Vacation's Disease' by Linnie Fisher Robinson, followed by 'Guide Lessons For October - Lesson I Theology and Testimony' about the Book of Mormon. The November Guide Lessons are not present in these pages.
